creator: rafan@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, Nov 07, 2006 at 11:28:34AM +0100, Nils M Holm wrote:
> diff -ru lang/sketchy-old/Makefile lang/sketchy/Makefile
> --- lang/sketchy-old/Makefile	Tue Oct 31 09:06:14 2006
> +++ lang/sketchy/Makefile	Tue Nov  7 11:25:13 2006
> @@ -6,12 +6,15 @@
>  #
>  
>  PORTNAME=	sketchy
> -PORTVERSION=	20061023
> +PORTVERSION=	20061107
>  CATEGORIES=	lang devel lisp scheme
>  MASTER_SITES=	http://www.t3x.org/files/
>  
>  MAINTAINER=	nmh@t3x.org
>  COMMENT=	An interpreter for purely applicative Scheme
> +
> +# Please /do/ keep this!
> +USE_REINPLACE=	yes
>  
>  USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
>  MAKE_ENV+=	BINOWN=${BINOWN} \

Could you please give me reasons why we need this?

Regards,
Rong-En fan
